name_en: Export Product! Size: 🀄️ ! Champion🏆 Quality⭐️⭐️⭐️ CHANEL 24S Denim 22bag, Jennie style. 🆕 New member of the 22bag family, rivet denim 22bag. Feels like the best denim series this season! Two sizes: Mini: 20x19x6, Small: 35x37x7. Jennie style, practical and durable for daily use. 🌟 The denim tone is perfect for the upcoming spring and summer. Pair with a camisole and skirt for a stunning look! Go for it, girls!
